text:
News on the NetJerusalem Post & Open Source Intel——Bio and Archives--September 5, 2024

News in Brief—News Headlines|CFP Comments|Reader Friendly|Subscribe|Email Us

A man was shot by Munich Police in an area near the Israeli consulate, according to statements by law enforcement.

The Munich police said that officers were operating at the Munich Documentation Center for the History of National Socialism in the Karolinenlatz area, next to the consulate, when officers opened fire on a "suspicious person." --More...

BREAKING ????????Reports of Intense gunfire outside the Israeli Consulate in Munich, Germany.pic.twitter.com/OwXwmlXuX5

title: Suspect shoots at Israeli consulate in Munich on Olympic massacre anniversary | Canada Free Press
description:
Suspect shoots at Israeli consulate in Munich on Olympic massacre anniversary
Thursday was the 52 anniversary of the 1972 Munich Massacre, in which 11 Israeli athletes were murdered by a Palestinian terror group.
